Text.value: Free number to identify, e.g. module-number
Toggle the logic of inputs 0: normal 1: inverted
Sets the corresponding channel as an output or input 0: input 1: output
Port1 Pin4(A): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port1 Pin2(B): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port2 Pin4(A): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port2 Pin2(B): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port3 Pin4(A): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port3 Pin2(B): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port4 Pin4(A): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port4 Pin2(B): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port5 Pin4(A): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port5 Pin2(B): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port6 Pin4(A): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port6 Pin2(B): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port7 Pin4(A): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port7 Pin2(B): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port8 Pin4(A): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Port8 Pin2(B): Manual output reset after overcurrent
Define output behaviour after overload 0: automatic recovery mode 1: controlled recovery mode (output has to be reset)
Define output behaviour in case of broken IO-Link communication 00: Set output to 0 01: Set output to 1 10: Hold current value 11: Reserved
Indicates an overcurrent at auxiliary supply or a voltage supply error (out of specification)
Indicates an overcurrent or short circuit at the auxiliary supply
Indicates a too low voltage supply (out of specification)
Indicates a too high voltage supply (out of specification)
Indicates an overcurrent at the corresponding digital output
Stretching of the input signal from 10 to 2550ms (time base: 10ms). Default setting: 0 = pulse stretching deactivated (standard pulse = 2,5ms)
Deactivate Impulse Stretching for all channels (standard pulse = 2,5ms)
Automatic output recovery after overcurrent for all channels
Manual output reset after overcurrent for all channels
All outputs set LOW after error
All outputs set HIGH after error
All outputs hold their current value after error
Manual output reset atfer overcurrent (all ports): No
Manual output reset atfer overcurrent (all ports): Yes
